caption: A person's hands open a white and blue cardboard box containing a collectible trading card. The scene is set in a room with a black surface and a background featuring a small inset video of a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. Across the bottom of the screen, large orange and white text reads "CASEBREAKS," while a smaller logo in the corner says "CASESBREAKS.COM." The box being opened is labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "2020." As the hands lift the lid, a plastic-encased trading card is revealed inside the packaging. The person then reaches in to remove the card from the box. The imagery is overlaid with a logo that includes the word "JASMY." The video progresses from the initial motion of opening the box to the act of retrieving the collectible item.
